title: premna pubescens
intro: Premna pubescens, also known as the Himalayan spruce or hairy Premna, is a species of plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to the Himalayas and parts of Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and improving digestion. Premna pubescens can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
